description: Fix CVTemplate to always show individual date fields as primary display and show sertifikat array as additional entries. Also improve error message for image-based/scanned PDFs.
steps: In src/components/CVTemplate.js, change the certificate section to ALWAYS show individual fields (tanggalJFT, tanggalSSW, tanggalSSWKaigo, tanggalJLPT, tanggalShuryoShomei) as primary rows, then show data.sertifikat array entries as additional rows below
In src/app/api/extract-cert-date/route.js, change the empty text error message to 'PDF berupa gambar/scan, tanggal tidak dapat diekstrak otomatis. Silakan isi manual.'
acceptance_criteria: CVTemplate always displays individual date fields regardless of whether data.sertifikat exists
data.sertifikat entries are shown below the standard certificate rows as additional entries
Error message for image-based PDFs reads 'PDF berupa gambar/scan, tanggal tidak dapat diekstrak otomatis. Silakan isi manual.'
npm run build succeeds without errors
verification: Run 'npm run build' in /projects/sandbox/cv-portal to verify the project builds without errors
findings: Build passes cleanly. CVTemplate now always shows individual date fields first, with sertifikat array entries only shown as additional rows when both nama and tanggal are non-empty. Error message for scanned PDFs updated to guide users to fill dates manually.
